properties.name: imdb-clone.identity.backend-host
properties.description: Public backend host used to build identity links such as email confirmation URLs.

properties.name: imdb-clone.identity.frontend-host
properties.description: Public frontend host used to build user-facing identity links such as password reset URLs.

properties.name: imdb-clone.identity.email-verification-enabled
properties.description: Whether new accounts must confirm their email address before they are enabled.

properties.name: imdb-clone.identity.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64 encoded secret used to sign JWT access tokens.

properties.name: imdb-clone.identity.jwt.expiration-in-ms
properties.description: JWT access token lifetime in milliseconds.

properties.name: imdb-clone.identity.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Origins allowed to call the backend with credentials.

properties.name: imdb-clone.media.storage.uri
properties.description: S3-compatible object storage endpoint URI used by the media module.

properties.name: imdb-clone.media.storage.access-key
properties.description: S3-compatible object storage access key used by the media module.

properties.name: imdb-clone.media.storage.secret-key
properties.description: S3-compatible object storage secret key used by the media module.

properties.name: imdb-clone.media.storage.bucket-name
properties.description: S3-compatible object storage bucket containing movie images and profile photos.

properties.name: imdb-clone.notification.email.sender
properties.description: Email address used as the sender for notification emails.

properties.name: imdb-clone.recommendation.open-trivia.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the Open Trivia recommendation support client.
